title: Leadership
summary: 9609 A Level — leadership roles, styles, and impact on organisational performance.
learningObjectives: Define leadership and distinguish from management.
Analyse impact on culture and change.

simpleExplanation.title: Inspiring direction
simpleExplanation.summary: Leadership sets vision, motivates people, and drives change. It complements management's focus on planning and control.

sections.content: **Leadership** (7.3.1) opens **7.3**. Contrast **leader vs manager** using case examples.
